title: Chytroma bipartita
taxonomy: Chytroma bipartita is classified within the order Staphylina, which is a subfamily of beetles belonging to the family Staphylinidae, commonly known as the rove beetles. This classification places Chytroma bipartita within the larger group of rove beetles, which are known for their small size and ability to thrive in various environments. The Staphylinidae family is one of the largest groups of beetles, consisting of over 63,000 described species. Chytroma bipartita's classification is a result of its unique characteristics and morphological features compared to other species within the family. The species' classification has been extensively studied and documented in various entomological publications.
